triples.subject: VinFast
triples.sentence: Revenue reached US$511.6 million, up 49.3% year-over-year.

triples.subject: VinFast
triples.sentence: In the third quarter of 2024, VinFast delivered 21,912 electric vehicles.

triples.subject: VinFast
triples.sentence: bringing total deliveries in Vietnam to more than 51,000 EVs from January 1 to October 31, 2024.

triples.subject: VinFast
triples.sentence: As of October 31, VinFast had eight dealer stores in six Philippine cities.
